title: Statistics — Bayes
description: Bayes theorem, odds form, and inference flowchart.

blocks.title: Terms
blocks.markdown:
| Term | Name |
|------|------|
| P(H) | Prior |
| P(D\|H) | Likelihood |
| P(H\|D) | Posterior |
| P(D) | Evidence |

blocks.title: Bayesian update
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Prior P H] --> B[Likelihood P D given H]
  B --> C[Normalize by P D]
  C --> D[Posterior P H given D]
